name: Original Green Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 3/4 oz.) cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish, mix together the soup, milk, soy sauce (if using), and pepper.
2. Stir in the cooked green beans and reserve two-thirds of the french fried onions for later.
3. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until heated through.
4. Sprinkle the reserved two-thirds of the french fried onions over the bean mixture.
5. Bake for an additional 5 minutes or until the onions are golden brown. Serves 6.
